properties.title: US Naval Blockade - Iranian Ports (Bandar Abbas)
properties.summary: US maintaining naval blockade of Iranian ports since April 13. Operation Project Freedom paused May 6 pending deal. 60-day MOU agreed by negotiators, Trump approval pending.

properties.title: Strait of Hormuz - US Naval Presence
properties.summary: Strait largely blocked since Feb 28. Iran IRGC coordinated 26 vessels in 24h. US blockade of Iranian ports creating oil price premium ($109+/bbl Brent).

properties.title: Lebanon War - Beirut
properties.summary: 2026 Lebanon War ongoing. Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire extended 45 days from May 15. Netanyahu pledged intensified strikes despite US-brokered truce. 3,200+ killed since March 2.

properties.title: Gaza - Post-Ceasefire Violence
properties.summary: Gaza ceasefire (Oct 10 2025) holding but fragile. 700+ Palestinians killed since ceasefire. All hostages recovered. Reconstruction at 0.5% rubble cleared. 77% population food insecure.

properties.title: Iran - Tehran (War Context)
properties.summary: Supreme Leader Khamenei assassinated Feb 28 in US-Israel airstrike. Iran has not confirmed MOU acceptance. Core demands: uranium stockpile, frozen assets, Lebanon war end.

properties.title: Russia - Moscow (Diplomacy)
properties.summary: Putin signaled readiness for talks after Victory Day but only after terms settled. Trump-backed 3-day ceasefire with 1,000-prisoner swap. Russia lost net 69 sq mi in April 21-May 19.

properties.title: Ukraine - Kyiv (Theater Overview)
properties.summary: Ukraine liberated one settlement May 12-19. ~1M Russian military casualties. 250-300K Ukrainian. Zelensky previously warned of Patriot missile shortage. Geneva talks ongoing.

properties.title: Ukraine - Eastern Front (Donetsk/Zaporizhzhia)
properties.summary: Russian net territorial loss in recent weeks reverses longer trend. OSINT group DeepState documents liberation of one settlement plus territory cleared in others May 12-19.

properties.title: Burkina Faso - Sahel Corridor
properties.summary: JNIM active in Sahel corridor. Wagner/Africa Corps presence ongoing. Multiple jihadist incidents in wider Burkina/Mali/Niger triangle. Estimated 145 weekly fatalities regional.

properties.title: Lake Chad Basin - ISWAP Activity
properties.summary: ISWAP continuing operations in Lake Chad basin. Nigeria, Niger, Chad all affected. Background watch-area signal.

properties.title: Sudan - Ongoing Civil Conflict
properties.summary: RSF-SAF conflict continuing. Estimated 110 weekly fatalities. Humanitarian crisis compounded; ReliefWeb active reporting.

properties.title: Myanmar - Conflict Continues
properties.summary: SAC vs resistance forces ongoing. Estimated 88 weekly fatalities. Arakan Army making territorial gains in Rakhine State.

properties.title: Taiwan Strait - Watch Area
properties.summary: PLA exercises continuing. US arms sales to Taiwan ongoing. South China Sea tensions elevated but below prior-year highs. Watch area active.

properties.title: US - Washington DC (Political/Legal)
properties.summary: DHS/ICE $70B reconciliation bill targeting June 1 deadline. Senate committee passed bill. Mahmoud Khalil deportation case heading to SCOTUS. Warsh confirmed as Fed chair 54-45.
